Non-Binding Term Sheet — Proposed Strategic Collaboration and Convertible Notes between Meditherm Diagnostics, Inc. (DE, SEC registrant) and Crown Meridian Bank, N.A. (U.S. banking organization).
Transaction: Unsecured convertible notes and a non-exclusive revenue cycle optimization partnership focused on telehealth diagnostics; no financing amount stated in this summary.
Purpose: Fund cloud migration and patient scheduling upgrades; partnership to provide non-advisory operational analytics and treasury solutions.
Tenor/Conversion: Market-standard U.S. convertible note mechanics to be negotiated; no pricing or cap included in this draft.
Conditions Precedent: Board approvals, customary diligence, HIPAA-compliant BAAs, GLBA information-security review, and any required banking notices.
Regulatory/Disclosure: Reg FD policies apply; no selective disclosure to analysts or investors; public updates, if material, to be made via Form 8-K and press release.
Information Barriers: Bank to maintain information-barrier controls between research, sales and trading, and advisory; employees must complete annual e-learning.
Insider Lists and Blackouts: Issuer to maintain an insider list and impose blackout windows around earnings; template to be provided, no individual names in this term sheet.
Cybersecurity: Parties will conduct tabletop exercises; no customer PII will be shared pre-close; security attestations to rely on SOC 2 reports provided via a secure data room.
Intentional MNPI carve-out: Issuer has identified a recent security incident in a non-production environment under forensic review that has not yet been pub
